records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe we last spoke during Operation Curtain Call.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe we last spoke during Operation Curtain Call.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe we last spoke during Operation Curtain Call.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cardenas Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cardenas Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cardenas Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't believe it's already been three years. Time really does fly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't believe it's already been three years. Time really does fly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't believe it's already been three years. Time really does fly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How have you been, Deputy Commander Swift?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How have you been, Deputy Commander Swift?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How have you been, Deputy Commander Swift?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I first want to thank you for sending reinforcements that day, sir.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I first want to thank you for sending reinforcements that day, sir.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I first want to thank you for sending reinforcements that day, sir.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do I owe this pleasure of your calling me on a private line?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do I owe this pleasure of your calling me on a private line?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do I owe this pleasure of your calling me on a private line?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. What I'm about to discuss won't be a waste of your time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. What I'm about to discuss won't be a waste of your time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. What I'm about to discuss won't be a waste of your time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard rumors that you're chasing after an Elysium Shadow. Is that true?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard rumors that you're chasing after an Elysium Shadow. Is that true?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard rumors that you're chasing after an Elysium Shadow. Is that true?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I tried my best to keep it discreet, but I guess you have better ears than that of a rabbit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I tried my best to keep it discreet, but I guess you have better ears than that of a rabbit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I tried my best to keep it discreet, but I guess you have better ears than that of a rabbit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Really? But what was all the secrecy for?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Really? But what was all the secrecy for?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Really? But what was all the secrecy for?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not the only one who wants Elysium Philharmonic to be extinct.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not the only one who wants Elysium Philharmonic to be extinct.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not the only one who wants Elysium Philharmonic to be extinct.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're both busy people, so I'll just cut to the chase.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're both busy people, so I'll just cut to the chase.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're both busy people, so I'll just cut to the chase.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Recently, there have been unusual movements by the Elysium Philharmonic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Recently, there have been unusual movements by the Elysium Philharmonic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Recently, there have been unusual movements by the Elysium Philharmonic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: According to intel, the suspended Elite Members have started to show up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: According to intel, the suspended Elite Members have started to show up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: According to intel, the suspended Elite Members have started to show up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Among them, <color=#ffd34c>Carmen</color>, the one you're after, was also seen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Among them, <color=#ffd34c>Carmen</color>, the one you're after, was also seen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Among them, <color=#ffd34c>Carmen</color>, the one you're after, was also seen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Carmen...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Carmen...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Carmen...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration is currently preparing for the Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration is currently preparing for the Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration is currently preparing for the Qliphoth Game.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So if we leave them unattended in this situation, I have no doubt that they'll become our ball and chain at the most crucial moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So if we leave them unattended in this situation, I have no doubt that they'll become our ball and chain at the most crucial moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So if we leave them unattended in this situation, I have no doubt that they'll become our ball and chain at the most crucial moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I'm requesting a coalition with the Yaksha Division, a contributor to Operation Curtain Call.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I'm requesting a coalition with the Yaksha Division, a contributor to Operation Curtain Call.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I'm requesting a coalition with the Yaksha Division, a contributor to Operation Curtain Call.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With the force of the Administration, eliminating the Elysium members won't be a problem.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With the force of the Administration, eliminating the Elysium members won't be a problem.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With the force of the Administration, eliminating the Elysium members won't be a problem.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Maestra is different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Maestra is different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Maestra is different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the other divisions hadn't helped in the last operation, I'd be six feet under right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the other divisions hadn't helped in the last operation, I'd be six feet under right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the other divisions hadn't helped in the last operation, I'd be six feet under right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, Maestra is our biggest threat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, Maestra is our biggest threat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, Maestra is our biggest threat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But she won't be an issue. Because what we're really after is the Counterside called Philharmonic Hall itself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But she won't be an issue. Because what we're really after is the Counterside called Philharmonic Hall itself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But she won't be an issue. Because what we're really after is the Counterside called Philharmonic Hall itself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Counterside itself?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Counterside itself?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Counterside itself?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, are you saying you're going after the Corruption Core?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, are you saying you're going after the Corruption Core?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, are you saying you're going after the Corruption Core?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Correct. Every Counterside has a core of the world that causes Corruption called the Corruption Core.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Correct. Every Counterside has a core of the world that causes Corruption called the Corruption Core.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Correct. Every Counterside has a core of the world that causes Corruption called the Corruption Core.

records.m_Talk_ENG: While we fight with Elysium, my sister will lead her guerilla force to destroy it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: While we fight with Elysium, my sister will lead her guerilla force to destroy it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: While we fight with Elysium, my sister will lead her guerilla force to destroy it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once the Corruption Core is destroyed, the Counterside will collapse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once the Corruption Core is destroyed, the Counterside will collapse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once the Corruption Core is destroyed, the Counterside will collapse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyone caught in the collapse won't make it out alive, not even a Demogorgon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyone caught in the collapse won't make it out alive, not even a Demogorgon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyone caught in the collapse won't make it out alive, not even a Demogorgon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if she doesn't get caught in it, just causing massive damage to Elysium Philharmonic will also be enough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if she doesn't get caught in it, just causing massive damage to Elysium Philharmonic will also be enough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if she doesn't get caught in it, just causing massive damage to Elysium Philharmonic will also be enough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At the very least, it'll be enough to keep them from disrupting the Administration during the Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At the very least, it'll be enough to keep them from disrupting the Administration during the Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At the very least, it'll be enough to keep them from disrupting the Administration during the Qliphoth Game.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've already submitted the operation proposal to the Headquarters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've already submitted the operation proposal to the Headquarters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've already submitted the operation proposal to the Headquarters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once approved, Hive Control will calculate the optimal timing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once approved, Hive Control will calculate the optimal timing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once approved, Hive Control will calculate the optimal timing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll grant you access as well so you can read the details.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll grant you access as well so you can read the details.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll grant you access as well so you can read the details.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Understood, Cardenas Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Understood, Cardenas Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Understood, Cardenas Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Remember, Yaksha Deputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Remember, Yaksha Deputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Remember, Yaksha Deputy Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's foolish to neglect a problem when you know it'll cause trouble.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's foolish to neglect a problem when you know it'll cause trouble.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's foolish to neglect a problem when you know it'll cause trouble.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For the success of the upcoming Qliphoth Game, Elysium Philharmonic must be eradicated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For the success of the upcoming Qliphoth Game, Elysium Philharmonic must be eradicated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For the success of the upcoming Qliphoth Game, Elysium Philharmonic must be eradicated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He's right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He's right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He's right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The surest way to prevent Alice from being swallowed by the Shadow is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The surest way to prevent Alice from being swallowed by the Shadow is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The surest way to prevent Alice from being swallowed by the Shadow is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: to kill Carmen and completely destroy the instrument.
records.m_Talk_DEU: to kill Carmen and completely destroy the instrument.
records.m_Talk_FRA: to kill Carmen and completely destroy the instrument.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For that, I'd do anything...
records.m_Talk_DEU: For that, I'd do anything...
records.m_Talk_FRA: For that, I'd do anything...

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Operation <color=#ffd34c>Troubleshooting</color>
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Operation <color=#ffd34c>Troubleshooting</color>
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Operation <color=#ffd34c>Troubleshooting</color>
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Are you sure you'll be all right, Deputy Commander?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Are you sure you'll be all right, Deputy Commander?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Are you sure you'll be all right, Deputy Commander?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu. It's not bad having the Commander worry about me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu. It's not bad having the Commander worry about me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu. It's not bad having the Commander worry about me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But don't worry. This is just a follow-up to the operation from three years ago.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But don't worry. This is just a follow-up to the operation from three years ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But don't worry. This is just a follow-up to the operation from three years ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I also read the operation report.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I also read the operation report.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I also read the operation report.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not doubting Sid and Pio, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not doubting Sid and Pio, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not doubting Sid and Pio, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Agh! But you never know! I got a bad feeling about this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Agh! But you never know! I got a bad feeling about this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Agh! But you never know! I got a bad feeling about this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's Philharmonic Hall. Anything can go wrong down there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's Philharmonic Hall. Anything can go wrong down there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's Philharmonic Hall. Anything can go wrong down there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how I see it, Cardenas's operation has a higher priority than ours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how I see it, Cardenas's operation has a higher priority than ours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how I see it, Cardenas's operation has a higher priority than ours.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
So, I think it's best to postpone our operation for Yaksha to help Cardenas
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
So, I think it's best to postpone our operation for Yaksha to help Cardenas
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
So, I think it's best to postpone our operation for Yaksha to help Cardenas
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay, Alice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay, Alice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay, Alice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In case anything happens, the Headquarters has put Maze and Camelot on standby.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In case anything happens, the Headquarters has put Maze and Camelot on standby.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In case anything happens, the Headquarters has put Maze and Camelot on standby.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maze Commander?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maze Commander?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maze Commander?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But above all, a Commander shouldn't change decisions so easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But above all, a Commander shouldn't change decisions so easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But above all, a Commander shouldn't change decisions so easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're the head of Yaksha now. Everyone here is relying on you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're the head of Yaksha now. Everyone here is relying on you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're the head of Yaksha now. Everyone here is relying on you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So don't worry about me and go do what you must.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So don't worry about me and go do what you must.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So don't worry about me and go do what you must.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll successfully complete my role too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll successfully complete my role too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll successfully complete my role too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You'd better return safe and sound, Deputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You'd better return safe and sound, Deputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You'd better return safe and sound, Deputy Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Attention everyone! We are currently in Depth 3 of the Counterside!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Attention everyone! We are currently in Depth 3 of the Counterside!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Attention everyone! We are currently in Depth 3 of the Counterside!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Today, our objective is to search for a hostile entity disguised as a Moderator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Today, our objective is to search for a hostile entity disguised as a Moderator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Today, our objective is to search for a hostile entity disguised as a Moderator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This thing has the ability to absorb Corruption rays from its surroundings to use as its power source!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This thing has the ability to absorb Corruption rays from its surroundings to use as its power source!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This thing has the ability to absorb Corruption rays from its surroundings to use as its power source!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are a total of three Moderators observed in this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are a total of three Moderators observed in this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are a total of three Moderators observed in this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you come across one that has lower CSE Levels surrounding it, it's our target!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you come across one that has lower CSE Levels surrounding it, it's our target!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you come across one that has lower CSE Levels surrounding it, it's our target!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All units should work in groups of three, but report to me if anything seems dangerous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All units should work in groups of three, but report to me if anything seems dangerous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All units should work in groups of three, but report to me if anything seems dangerous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll come save you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll come save you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll come save you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, the Yaksha Division. Start searching!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, the Yaksha Division. Start searching!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, the Yaksha Division. Start searching!

root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll grant you access as well so you can read the details.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll grant you access as well so you can read the details.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Understood, Cardenas Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Understood, Cardenas Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Understood, Cardenas Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Remember, Yaksha Deputy Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Remember, Yaksha Deputy Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Remember, Yaksha Deputy Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's foolish to neglect a problem when you know it'll cause trouble.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's foolish to neglect a problem when you know it'll cause trouble.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's foolish to neglect a problem when you know it'll cause trouble.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For the success of the upcoming Qliphoth Game, Elysium Philharmonic must be eradicated.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For the success of the upcoming Qliphoth Game, Elysium Philharmonic must be eradicated.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For the success of the upcoming Qliphoth Game, Elysium Philharmonic must be eradicated.

root.m_Talk_ENG: He's right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He's right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He's right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The surest way to prevent Alice from being swallowed by the Shadow is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The surest way to prevent Alice from being swallowed by the Shadow is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The surest way to prevent Alice from being swallowed by the Shadow is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: to kill Carmen and completely destroy the instrument.
root.m_Talk_DEU: to kill Carmen and completely destroy the instrument.
root.m_Talk_FRA: to kill Carmen and completely destroy the instrument.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For that, I'd do anything...
root.m_Talk_DEU: For that, I'd do anything...
root.m_Talk_FRA: For that, I'd do anything...

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Operation <color=#ffd34c>Troubleshooting</color>
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Operation <color=#ffd34c>Troubleshooting</color>
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Operation <color=#ffd34c>Troubleshooting</color>
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Are you sure you'll be all right, Deputy Commander?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Are you sure you'll be all right, Deputy Commander?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Are you sure you'll be all right, Deputy Commander?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu. It's not bad having the Commander worry about me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu. It's not bad having the Commander worry about me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu. It's not bad having the Commander worry about me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But don't worry. This is just a follow-up to the operation from three years ago.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But don't worry. This is just a follow-up to the operation from three years ago.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But don't worry. This is just a follow-up to the operation from three years ago.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I also read the operation report.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I also read the operation report.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I also read the operation report.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not doubting Sid and Pio, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not doubting Sid and Pio, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not doubting Sid and Pio, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Agh! But you never know! I got a bad feeling about this!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Agh! But you never know! I got a bad feeling about this!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Agh! But you never know! I got a bad feeling about this!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's Philharmonic Hall. Anything can go wrong down there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's Philharmonic Hall. Anything can go wrong down there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's Philharmonic Hall. Anything can go wrong down there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how I see it, Cardenas's operation has a higher priority than ours.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how I see it, Cardenas's operation has a higher priority than ours.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how I see it, Cardenas's operation has a higher priority than ours.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
So, I think it's best to postpone our operation for Yaksha to help Cardenas
8g!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
So, I think it's best to postpone our operation for Yaksha to help Cardenas
8g!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
So, I think it's best to postpone our operation for Yaksha to help Cardenas
8g!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay, Alice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay, Alice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay, Alice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In case anything happens, the Headquarters has put Maze and Camelot on standby.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In case anything happens, the Headquarters has put Maze and Camelot on standby.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In case anything happens, the Headquarters has put Maze and Camelot on standby.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maze Commander?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maze Commander?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maze Commander?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But above all, a Commander shouldn't change decisions so easily.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But above all, a Commander shouldn't change decisions so easily.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But above all, a Commander shouldn't change decisions so easily.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're the head of Yaksha now. Everyone here is relying on you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're the head of Yaksha now. Everyone here is relying on you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're the head of Yaksha now. Everyone here is relying on you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So don't worry about me and go do what you must.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So don't worry about me and go do what you must.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So don't worry about me and go do what you must.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll successfully complete my role too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll successfully complete my role too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll successfully complete my role too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You'd better return safe and sound, Deputy Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You'd better return safe and sound, Deputy Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You'd better return safe and sound, Deputy Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Attention everyone! We are currently in Depth 3 of the Counterside!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Attention everyone! We are currently in Depth 3 of the Counterside!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Attention everyone! We are currently in Depth 3 of the Counterside!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Today, our objective is to search for a hostile entity disguised as a Moderator.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Today, our objective is to search for a hostile entity disguised as a Moderator.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Today, our objective is to search for a hostile entity disguised as a Moderator.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This thing has the ability to absorb Corruption rays from its surroundings to use as its power source!
root.m_Talk_DEU: This thing has the ability to absorb Corruption rays from its surroundings to use as its power source!
root.m_Talk_FRA: This thing has the ability to absorb Corruption rays from its surroundings to use as its power source!

root.m_Talk_ENG: There are a total of three Moderators observed in this world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There are a total of three Moderators observed in this world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There are a total of three Moderators observed in this world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you come across one that has lower CSE Levels surrounding it, it's our target!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you come across one that has lower CSE Levels surrounding it, it's our target!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you come across one that has lower CSE Levels surrounding it, it's our target!

root.m_Talk_ENG: All units should work in groups of three, but report to me if anything seems dangerous.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All units should work in groups of three, but report to me if anything seems dangerous.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All units should work in groups of three, but report to me if anything seems dangerous.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll come save you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll come save you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll come save you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, the Yaksha Division. Start searching!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, the Yaksha Division. Start searching!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, the Yaksha Division. Start searching!
